info.name: HimShakti API — W4_APICollection_TBI-26100016
info.description: REST API collection for HimShakti AI D2C Platform. Covers all 7 product endpoints: GET all, search, GET single, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.

request.description: Verify the API server is running
Fetch all products. Optional query params: ?category=Snacks or ?inStock=true

response.name: 200 OK — All products returned
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 6,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
      "name": "Himalayan Millet Crunch Bar",
      "category": "Snacks",
      "price": 199,
      "weight": "200g (pack of 6)",
      "description": "Stone-ground finger millet meets raw Kumaoni jaggery...",
      "ingredients": "Finger millet, jaggery, sesame, ghee",
      "features": ["No Preservatives", "Handmade", "Rich in Iron"],
      "badge": "Bestseller",
      "emoji": "🌾",
      "inStock": true,
      "createdAt": "2026-06-01T10:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-06-01T10:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Search products by name, description, or category
Fetch a single product by its MongoDB _id

response.name: 200 OK — Product found
response.body:
{

response.name: 200 OK — Partially updated
